title: White Chocolate Jazzies - Snowies│ Gift Jar │ 515g │ Original White Chocolate Jazzies - Snowies Retro Sweets Victorian Gift Jar by Candy Hive - Timeless Treats, Authentic Flavour
features: Original White Chocolate Jazzies - Snowies Just Like You Remember! Candy Hive Premium Retro Sweets Promise to Transport You Back to Your Beloved Childhood Sweet Shop.
Proudly crafted in the UK and packed in our traditional Berkshire sweet factory, each jar is securely sealed to deliver lasting freshness straight to your door!
Candy Hive's legendary sweets are guaranteed to brighten anyone's day. Our jars are filled to the brim with the finest quality retro treats!

Our traditional sweets make the perfect gift for any occasion—birthdays, weddings, Valentine's Day, Mother's or Father's Day, Easter, Christmas stocking fillers, Secret Santa, anniversaries, christenings, or simply to say "I'm sorry" or "Thank you." These vintage treats are a delightful and unique way to bring joy!
Our classic sweet jars are packed fresh and come with long shelf lives.
Perfect for Gifts and Special Occasions
description: Product description White Chocolate Jazzies - Snowies│ Gift Jar │ 515g │ Original White Chocolate Jazzies - Snowies Retro Sweets Victorian Gift Jar by Candy Hive - Timeless Treats, Authentic Flavour Ingredients Sugar, Partially Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil (Coconut, Palm Kernel), Whey Powder (from Milk), Cocoa Powder, Soybean Flour, Emulsifier: Soya Lecithin; Hazelnut Paste, Natural Flavourings.
